description:
A media streaming client for Plex


Fixed
- Jellyfin home screen offline loops
- Playback crashes on older Android and Fire OS devices
- Back navigation on media and catalog details
- Music volume persistence and mini-player interactions
- D-pad volume and sync sliders
- Keyboard shortcut recording
- Live TV guide long-press actions and recording sheets
- Watch Together leave and end-session actions
Full Changelog: 2.9.0...2.9.1
